articles.title: Why Did John F. Kennedy Jr. Choose to Get Married on Cumberland Island? Inside the First African Baptist Church's Rich History - Yahoo News UK
articles.description: The church had decades of rich history before hosting one of history's most significant weddings
articles.content:
NEED TO KNOW
  • John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette were married on Sept. 21, 1996, at the First African Baptist Church on Cumberland Island, off the coast of Georgia
